item.title: MIUI OS3.0.3.0.WNKEUXM Fastboot update for POCO F6 Pro EEA
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: POCO F6 Pro EEA

Codename: vermeer

Version: OS3.0.3.0.WNKEUXM | 16.0

Size: 9.5 GB

MD5: 7f84f0565807949e9c89ad0a4abb74aa

Changelog:
[System]
Updated the security patch to December 2025. Increased system security.

Download: Here
